chapters.title: Home Office Setup
chapters.content: Nina transformed a small corner of her apartment into a home office. A desk, a lamp, and a quiet space changed everything.

chapters.title: Video Calls All Day
chapters.content: Remote work meant flexibility, but also endless video meetings. Sometimes Nina missed simple conversations near the office coffee machine.

chapters.title: Finding Balance
chapters.content: She learned to close the laptop on time and go for evening walks. Working from home required boundaries as much as freedom.
